name_cn:
💰Niki Lambskin_28cm
For the spring/summer Niki lambskin, the metal chain has been replaced with a substantial gold chain, adding elegance and luxury to the bag. It's not overly trendy but still shows personality—a truly special bag! Using exclusive ZP original leather and highest-grade solid copper hardware, it definitely has that authentic ZP feel.
Model: 498894
Size: 28x20.5x8.5cm
